title: lotus frondosus
intro: Lotus frondosus, also known as the Lotus leaf, is a type of aquatic plant belonging to the Nelumbo family. Traditionally used in herbal medicine, the Lotus leaf is valued for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can help to combat infections and reduce swelling. The plant is believed to provide several health benefits, including lowering cholesterol levels, improving digestion, and reducing blood pressure. Herbal preparations of Lotus leaf can be consumed as teas, infusions, or dried extracts, and are often used to support liver health and promote detoxification.
